g.text: State: Post1 (new flight added to database)
Write permission on Flight Data Store
Edit Existing Departure Flight's Scheduled Time (Happy Path)
Write permission on Flight Data Store
Read permission on Flight Management Dashboard
Permission check occurs for all operations
Only Read, Write, Execute permissions allowed
Owner must be in accessible set
Write includes Read, Execute includes Read, Admin includes all
System handles up to 100 concurrent registrations
